steps.title: Use the example relationship
steps.content: The first sentence defines community-based participatory research as a model in which tribal nations and research institutions are equal partners. The collaboration that follows matches that model because tribal citizens worked with scientists on methodology and continued helping with data collection.

steps.title: Choose the precise word
steps.content: Choice A means avoids, Choice B means overshadows, and Choice C means invents or makes up. The context calls for a word meaning serves as a clear example of the equal-partnership model. The answer is D.
